criteria.description: Delete charter.generator module (CharterDraft/build_charter_draft/write_charter) + its __init__ import and __all__ entries.
criteria.evidence: WP01 (commit d5b8324f9): src/charter/generator.py deleted; src/charter/__init__.py import (was line 31) + 3 __all__ entries removed. git grep finds zero live src refs. uv run pytest tests/charter/test_generator.py tests/architectural/test_no_dead_modules.py -> 6 passed. Net -156 LOC.
criteria.notes: Reviewer confirmed the implementer's extra removal of an unused load_doctrine_catalog import was a legitimate ruff-F401 fix (its only consumer was the deleted test). LM-4 clear: no charter.md scaffold path dropped.

criteria.description: Retire the generator dead-API tests while preserving the live write_compiled_charter symlink-guard tests.
criteria.evidence: WP01: tests/charter/test_generator.py surgically edited (not deleted, LM-3) -> generator import + 4 generator-API tests removed; the 4 write_compiled_charter symlink-guard tests survive and pass.
criteria.notes: C-003 preserved: no live coverage deleted to go green.

criteria.description: Delete charter.extractor module + its test-only references (dedicated tests retired; incidental fixtures reconstructed).
criteria.evidence: WP02 (commit 8a0a1fcf2): src/charter/extractor.py (577 LOC) + 5 dedicated test files deleted. The 2 incidental fixtures (test_activate_resolves_no_answers_edit.py, test_charter_context_spdd_reasons.py) RECONSTRUCTED inline (GovernanceConfig/DoctrineSelectionConfig from interview.selected_*/compiled.*) so the live is_spdd_reasons_active assertions survive (31 passed). Net -1685/+55 LOC.
criteria.notes: Reviewer verified is_spdd_reasons_active reads charter.yaml off disk (real production path, not a synthetic fixture). A live sync() guard in the deleted test_sync_references.py is preserved by test_sync.py.

criteria.description: Remove the deferred extractor allowlist entries across all four gate surfaces; dead-code baseline shrinks downward.
criteria.evidence: WP02: _baselines.yaml category_5_wp_in_flight_adapters 1->0 (downward); test_no_dead_modules _CATEGORY_5 frozenset emptied; test_no_dead_symbols Extractor SymbolKey frozenset + its union term removed; test_chokepoint_coverage _CARVE_OUTS extractor line removed (4th gate, squad-found). uv run pytest test_no_dead_modules test_no_dead_symbols test_ratchet_baselines test_chokepoint_coverage -> 32 passed; no stale/dangling/missing.
criteria.notes: LM-2 atomicity held across all four surfaces; baseline never green-washed upward.

criteria.description: Render path (build_charter_context) stays no-op-stable, pinned by a regression guard.
criteria.evidence: WP03 (commit e0784757b): tests/charter/test_context_noop_stability.py -> G1 single render + G3 render-twice both leave 0 tracked-doctrine diffs; asserts first_load True->False (real path re-ran). 3 passed. Zero production change (already fixed by #2773).
criteria.notes: Fixture clones the repo so it observes the committed .gitignore (doctrine tracked), defeating the local .git/info/exclude mask; a fail-loud soundness test guards against reverting to a masked fixture.

criteria.description: Preflight/synthesize surface is no-op-stable, pinned by a regression guard (no behavioral change).
criteria.evidence: WP04 (commit 42e574725): tests/specify_cli/charter_runtime/test_preflight_noop_stability.py -> two run_charter_preflight(auto_refresh=True) runs on a real-synthesized doctrine-tracked committed-clean fixture leave git clean + synthesize uninvoked (zero non-git subprocess). 2 passed. ZERO src change (verified by reviewer).
criteria.notes: Post-tasks squad refuted a behavioral fix: already ensured by #2732 (charter.yaml content-hash freshness) + #1912 (four _substantively_equal promote guards). Fixture uses make_fresh_repo (built_in_only=False), not masked.

criteria.description: No-op-stability guards assert against a real-synthesized, doctrine-tracked fixture (not the masked/built_in_only checkout).
criteria.evidence: WP03 uses a fresh git clone (empty .git/info/exclude -> committed .gitignore tracks doctrine) + a fail-loud fixture-soundness test. WP04 uses make_fresh_repo with a manifest bundle_content_hash computed from real charter.yaml (not built_in_only). Both reviewer-verified as genuinely tracked, not vacuous.
criteria.notes: LM-1 (this checkout masks doctrine churn via .git/info/exclude and is built_in_only) neutralized in both guards.

criteria.description: Close #2373 with a terminal issue-matrix verdict backed by a regression guard.
criteria.evidence: issue-matrix.md #2373 -> verified-already-fixed (render by #2773; preflight by #2732/#1912). Regression guards landed and approved: WP03 (render) + WP04 (preflight/INV-2). WP04 T013 additionally asserts a genuine charter.yaml edit still synthesizes (anti-over-suppression, INV-2).
criteria.notes: in-mission -> verified-already-fixed flip is terminal; #1797/#1914/#2467/#2216/#2539 remain deferred-with-followup with handles; #2773/#2732/#1912 verified-already-fixed.
